footer.description: Professional cybersecurity and VAPT services — protecting applications and infrastructure through real-world security testing across Saudi Arabia.

services.description: Protecting your applications and infrastructure through real-world security testing across Saudi Arabia.

services.descriptionAr: حماية تطبيقاتك وبنيتك التحتية من خلال اختبارات أمنية واقعية في المملكة العربية السعودية.

whyUs.label: Why Reliable
whyUs.title: Why Choose Reliable Company
whyUs.description: 100+ years of combined experience, 300+ clients secured, and 30,000+ vulnerabilities remediated.
whyUs.descriptionAr: أكثر من 100 سنة خبرة مجتمعة، وأكثر من 300 عميل محمي، وأكثر من 30,000 ثغرة تم معالجتها.

industries.label: Industries
industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.description: Cybersecurity and VAPT services across desalination, oil & gas, construction, manufacturing, utilities, and environmental sectors.

divisions.label: Divisions

divisions.descriptionAr: اختبار الاختراق (VAPT) واستشارات الأمن السيبراني — فريق أمني متكامل.

projects.label: Projects

projects.descriptionAr: مجموعة مختارة من مشاريع الأمن السيبراني واختبار الاختراق في القطاعات المالية والصناعية.

ctaBanner.title: Protect Your Business Today
ctaBanner.description: Request a consultation and our cybersecurity team will respond within one business day.
ctaBanner.descriptionAr: اطلب استشارة وسيرد فريق الأمن السيبراني خلال يوم عمل واحد.

hero.headline: Professional Cyber Security & Penetration Testing
hero.headlineAr: خدمات أمن سيبراني واختبار اختراق احترافية
hero.subheadline: Reliable Company provides professional Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT), web application security testing, network security assessment, and cybersecurity consulting services for businesses across Saudi Arabia.
hero.subheadlineAr: تقدم شركة ريلايبل خدمات تقييم الثغرات واختبار الاختراق (VAPT) واختبار أمان تطبيقات الويب وتقييم أمن الشبكات واستشارات الأمن السيبراني للشركات في المملكة.

divisions.name: Offensive Security
divisions.description: Real-world penetration testing, red team exercises, and vulnerability assessments across web, mobile, network, API, OT, and IoT environments.
bulletPoints: Web, mobile, and API penetration testing
OT, IoT, and source code security reviews

divisions.name: GRC & Compliance
divisions.description: Governance, risk, and compliance services including gap assessments and ISMS audits aligned with ISO 27001 and Saudi regulatory frameworks.
bulletPoints: Gap assessment against ISO 27001 and NCA controls

divisions.name: Incident Response & Resilience
divisions.description: Rapid incident response and ransomware recovery support to contain threats, restore operations, and strengthen resilience.

divisions.name: Security Assessments
divisions.description: Targeted security assessments across cloud, Active Directory, servers, firewalls, endpoints, email, storage, databases, VPN, wireless, and IAM.

services.title: Web Application Penetration Testing (WAPT)
services.shortDescription: In-depth OWASP-based testing of web applications to uncover authentication, authorization, and business logic flaws.

children.text: Web applications remain the primary attack surface for most organizations. Our WAPT engagements assess authentication, session management, input validation, access controls, and business logic across customer-facing and internal platforms.
Deliverables include prioritized findings with proof-of-concept exploits, remediation guidance, and optional retest validation.

services.overviewDescription: Web applications remain the primary attack surface for most organizations. Our WAPT engagements assess authentication, session management, input validation, access controls, and business logic across customer-facing and internal platforms.
overviewBulletPoints: Web, mobile, and API penetration testing
OT, IoT, and source code security reviews
subServices: Web, mobile, and API penetration testing
OT, IoT, and source code security reviews
services.benefitsTitle: Why Choose Web Application Penetration Testing (WAPT)

benefits.title: Real-World Expertise
benefits.description: Practitioners with hands-on experience across Saudi industrial and enterprise sectors.

benefits.title: Actionable Reports
benefits.description: Prioritized findings with clear remediation guidance and executive summaries.

benefits.title: Certified Professionals
benefits.description: Industry-certified security experts with deep technical domain knowledge.

benefits.title: Regulatory Alignment
benefits.description: Assessments aligned with NCA, ISO 27001, and international frameworks.

faqs.question: What does Web Application Penetration Testing (WAPT) include?
faqs.answer: Web Application Penetration Testing (WAPT) helps organizations identify security weaknesses and receive practical remediation guidance from certified professionals.

faqs.question: How long does an engagement take?
faqs.answer: Duration depends on scope — typically 1–4 weeks from kickoff to final report delivery.

faqs.question: Will testing disrupt operations?
faqs.answer: We coordinate closely with your team and work within agreed rules of engagement to minimize impact.

faqs.question: Why choose Reliable Company?
faqs.answer: We combine deep technical expertise with practical guidance tailored to Saudi regulatory and industry requirements.

services.ctaDescription: Speak with our cybersecurity team about protecting your applications and infrastructure.

services.title: Mobile Application Security Testing (Android / iOS)
services.shortDescription: Static, dynamic, and runtime security analysis of Android and iOS applications and their backend integrations.

children.text: Mobile apps process sensitive data and connect to APIs that attackers actively target. We assess insecure storage, weak cryptography, improper platform usage, certificate pinning bypass, and API/backend weaknesses.
Testing covers both client-side application security and server-side components for end-to-end assurance.

services.overviewDescription: Mobile apps process sensitive data and connect to APIs that attackers actively target. We assess insecure storage, weak cryptography, improper platform usage, certificate pinning bypass, and API/backend weaknesses.

services.title: Network Penetration Testing (Internal / External)
services.shortDescription: External and internal network penetration testing for perimeters, segments, firewalls, and critical infrastructure.

children.text: We simulate real attacker paths against your network perimeter and internal segments to identify exploitable misconfigurations, weak segmentation, and exposed services.
Engagements align with industry frameworks and Saudi NCA cybersecurity controls for industrial and enterprise environments.

services.title: API Security Testing
services.shortDescription: Dedicated API penetration testing for REST, GraphQL, and microservices architectures.

children.text: APIs connect web, mobile, and third-party systems — making them a high-value target. We test for broken authentication, excessive data exposure, injection, and authorization flaws.
Our assessments help secure integrations before they reach production or after major releases.

services.title: Source Code Security Review
services.shortDescription: Manual and tool-assisted review of application source code to identify security defects before deployment.

Our reviewers work with development teams to integrate secure coding practices into the SDLC.

faqs.question: What does IT Security Managed Services include?
faqs.answer: IT Security Managed Services helps organizations identify security weaknesses and receive practical remediation guidance from certified professionals.

faqs.question: How long does an engagement take?
faqs.answer: Duration depends on scope — typically 1–4 weeks from kickoff to final report delivery.

faqs.question: Will testing disrupt operations?
faqs.answer: We coordinate closely with your team and work within agreed rules of engagement to minimize impact.

faqs.question: Why choose Reliable Company?
faqs.answer: We combine deep technical expertise with practical guidance tailored to Saudi regulatory and industry requirements.

services.ctaDescription: Speak with our cybersecurity team about protecting your applications and infrastructure.

projects.title: Enterprise Web Application VAPT
projects.shortDescription: Full-scope web application penetration testing for a major financial services platform in Saudi Arabia.

children.text: Comprehensive OWASP-based testing uncovered critical authentication and authorization flaws. Delivered prioritized remediation roadmap with retest validation.

projects.title: Oil & Gas Network Infrastructure VAPT
projects.shortDescription: External and internal penetration testing for an oil & gas operator's corporate and OT network segments.

children.text: Dual-perspective VAPT identified segmentation gaps and exposed services. Provided hardening guidance aligned with NCA cybersecurity controls.

projects.title: Cloud Security Assessment — AWS
projects.shortDescription: Cloud configuration review and penetration testing for a multi-account AWS environment.

children.text: Identified misconfigured S3 buckets, overly permissive IAM policies, and network exposure. Delivered CIS benchmark-aligned remediation plan.

projects.title: ISO 27001 Certification Support
projects.shortDescription: Gap analysis and ISMS implementation support for an industrial manufacturing group.

children.text: Guided the organization from initial gap assessment through control implementation, internal audit, and successful certification readiness.

projects.title: Mobile Banking App Security Testing
projects.shortDescription: iOS and Android security assessment for a consumer banking application.

children.text: Static and dynamic analysis identified insecure data storage and API weaknesses. Coordinated remediation with development team and validated fixes.

values.title: Real-World Testing
values.description: Simulated attacks that mirror actual threat actor techniques to find real vulnerabilities.

values.title: Actionable Results
values.description: Prioritized findings with clear remediation guidance — not just theoretical reports.

values.title: Industry Expertise
values.description: Deep experience securing industrial, financial, and enterprise environments across Saudi Arabia.

values.title: Compliance Ready
values.description: Assessments aligned with NCA, ISO 27001, and international cybersecurity frameworks.

children.text: Reliable Company is a specialized cybersecurity services group providing Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT), web application security testing, network security assessment, and cybersecurity consulting across Saudi Arabia. As a group of companies, we started our operations in 2016 from UAE and in 2023 we expanded our business in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Our management team has 100+ years of combined experience securing industrial and enterprise environments across Desalination, Oil & Gas, Water Infrastructure, Manufacturing, and critical infrastructure sectors. Passion for quality, innovative security methodologies, and hands-on testing experience are the qualities that make our team unique in delivering real-world protection.

Our certified security professionals are committed to identifying vulnerabilities before attackers do — protecting applications, networks, cloud environments, and industrial systems with rigorous testing and actionable remediation guidance.

شركة ريلايبل مجموعة متخصصة في خدمات الأمن السيبراني تقدم تقييم الثغرات واختبار الاختراق (VAPT) واختبار أمان تطبيقات الويب وتقييم أمن الشبكات واستشارات الأمن السيبراني في المملكة العربية السعودية. بدأنا عملياتنا في 2016 من الإمارات وفي 2023 وسّعنا أعمالنا في المملكة.

يتمتع فريق الإدارة لدينا بأكثر من 100 سنة خبرة مجتمعة في تأمين البيئات الصناعية والمؤسسية عبر التحلية والنفط والغاز والبنية التحتية والتصنيع. الشغف بالجودة ومنهجيات الأمن المبتكرة والخبرة العملية في الاختبار هي ما يميز فريقنا.
ملتزم محترفو الأمن السيبراني المعتمدون لدينا بتحديد الثغرات قبل استغلالها — حماية التطبيقات والشبكات وبيئات السحابة والأنظمة الصناعية باختبارات صارمة وإرشادات معالجة عملية.
Reliable Company ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard personal information when you visit our website or contact us.
We may collect your name, email address, phone number, and project details when you submit our contact form. This information is used solely to respond to your inquiries and provide our services.
We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties except as required by law or to deliver services you have requested.
For questions about this policy, contact us at info@reliablecompany.sa.

By accessing and using the Reliable Company website, you agree to these Terms of Service. All content on this website is the property of Reliable Company and is protected by applicable copyright laws.
Information provided on this site is for general reference only and does not constitute professional advice. Specific project requirements should be discussed with our team.
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

blogPosts.title: Cybersecurity Trends in Saudi Arabia 2026
blogPosts.excerpt: Key threats and security priorities for Saudi enterprises in the evolving threat landscape.
blogPosts.content:
Saudi Arabia continues to digitize rapidly across government, financial, and industrial sectors — making robust cybersecurity essential.

Reliable Company helps organizations stay ahead with VAPT, cloud security assessments, and compliance support aligned with NCA requirements.

careers.title: Penetration Tester
careers.description: Conduct network and web application penetration tests for enterprise clients.
responsibilities: Perform VAPT assessments across network and web environments
Document findings with proof-of-concept and remediation guidance
Support retest and client reporting activities

careers.description: Assess AWS, Azure, and GCP environments for security misconfigurations.
